de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Interface IProgramMethod

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Declaration, IObserverFunction, MemberDeclaration, ModelElement, Named, NonTerminalProgramElement, Operator, ProgramElement, SortedOperator, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    ProgramConstruct

    ProgramMethod, ProgramSV

    public interface IProgramMethod
extends IObserverFunction, SourceElement, ProgramElement, MemberDeclaration

    • Method Detail

      • getMethodDeclaration

        MethodDeclaration getMethodDeclaration()

      • getParameterType

        KeYJavaType getParameterType(int i)
        returns the KeYJavaType of the i-th parameter declaration. This method does not care about the invoker as argSort does.
        Parameters:
        i - the int specifying the parameter position
        Returns:
        the KeYJavaType of the i-th parameter

      • getBody

        StatementBlock getBody()

      • getParamTypes

        ImmutableArray<KeYJavaType> getParamTypes()
        Description copied from interface: IObserverFunction
        Returns the parameter types of this observer symbol. "Parameters" here includes only the *explicit* parameters, not the heap and the receiver object.
        Specified by:
        getParamTypes in interface IObserverFunction
